sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_complex (id UInt32, arr Array(Int32), str Array(String), num Nullable(Int32));
SELECT id, arrayUnion(arr) AS union_array, str FROM test_complex WHERE arrayUnion(arr) <> [];
SELECT id, arrayUnion(arr) AS union_array FROM test_complex WHERE (arrayUnion(arr) <> [1, 2, 3]) AND (arrayUnion([2, 3], arr) <> NULL);
SELECT id, arrayUnion(arr) AS union_array, str FROM test_complex WHERE arrayUnion([1, NULL], arr) <> [1];
SELECT id, arrayUnion(arr) AS union_array FROM (SELECT id, arr FROM test_complex WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_complex WHERE str[1] <> 'e')) AS subquery;
SELECT id, arrayUnion(arr) AS union_array FROM (SELECT id, arr FROM test_complex UNION ALL SELECT id, arr FROM test_complex WHERE arr = []) AS combined WHERE union_array <> [2, 3];
SELECT id, arrayUnion(arr) AS union_array FROM test_complex GROUP BY id HAVING arrayUnion(arr) <> arrayUnion([10], [20]);
SELECT id, arrayUnion(arr) AS union_array FROM test_complex ORDER BY (arrayUnion(arr) <> arr) DESC, arrayUnion(arr) ASC;
